mapper.select: SELECT rank_no, user_id, real_name, avatar_url, total_hours, activity_count, refreshed_at FROM leaderboard_cache ORDER BY rank_no ASC

SELECT activity_id, title, location, start_time, end_time, activity_status, total_quota, signed_count, checkin_count, position_total_quota, position_count, activity_tags, avg_activity_score, comment_count, creator_id, creator_name FROM v_activity_heat ORDER BY checkin_count DESC, signed_count DESC

SELECT MONTH(c.checkin_time) AS month, COUNT(DISTINCT c.user_id) AS participant_count, COUNT(DISTINCT c.activity_id) AS activity_count FROM checkin c WHERE YEAR(c.checkin_time) = #{year} AND c.duration_hours IS NOT NULL GROUP BY MONTH(c.checkin_time) ORDER BY month ASC
